data.title: Two-Step Verification
data.description: An optional feature providing an additional layer of security during account setup.
data.technical_spec: Combines password and a 6-digit PIN for user verification.

data.title: App Sandbox
data.description: Use of a sandbox to isolate app processes, preventing malicious code execution.
data.technical_spec: Sandboxing involves running the application in a controlled environment.

data.title: Automatic Updates
data.description: Security patches and updates are automatically rolled out to users to address vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated update system ensures users are protected against known exploits.

data.title: Security Audits
data.description: Regular security audits are conducted to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Involves both automated and manual testing to find security loopholes.

data.title: Network-level Defense
data.description: Advanced measures to protect against network intrusions and DDoS attacks.
data.technical_spec: Implementation of firewalls and intrusion detection systems.
